publishedAbstract: * ceph-exporter crash with "boost::json::detail::throw_invalid_argument(char const*, boost::source_location const&)+0x37": ~~~ sh-5.1$ ceph health detail HEALTH_WARN 3 daemons have recently crashed [WRN] RECENT_CRASH: 3 daemons have recently crashed client.ceph-exporter crashed on host rook-ceph-exporter-worker1-58d8cdd867-x8czl at 2024-11-19T01:24:19.210378Z client.ceph-exporter crashed on host rook-ceph-exporter-worker1-58d8cdd867-hv6n4 at 2024-11-19T01:42:30.544579Z client.ceph-exporter crashed on host rook-ceph-exporter-worker2-59d8fd8b88-b6kvq at 2024-11-19T02:06:29.296113Z # ceph crash info crash_2024-11-19T02\:06\:29.296113Z_392933d0-1bd0-4bd7-a933-02e2466352d7......
